languages.text: "Точка отсчета... принята за верную. Начинаю перестройку координат". {n}Гудение внутренних механизмов Экзальта-117 становится тише и в размеренном шуме вы слышите его негромкий, удивленный шепот:{/n}"Инфо-разметка сошлась. От нее веет... Холодом".

"The point of reference... has been accepted as valid. Initiating coordinate reconstruction." {n}The humming of Exalt-117's internal mechanisms grows quieter, and in the rhythmic noise you hear his hushed whisper of surprise:{/n} "The data-index has harmonised. It radiates... cold."
languages.original_text: "Точка отсчета... принята за верную. Начинаю перестройку координат". {n}Гудение внутренних механизмов Экзальта-117 становится тише и в размеренном шуме вы слышите его негромкий, удивленный шепот:{/n}"Инфо-разметка сошлась. От нее веет... Холодом".

traits.locale_text: "The point of reference... has been accepted as valid. Initiating coordinate reconstruction." {n}The humming of Exalt-117's internal mechanisms grows quieter, and in the rhythmic noise you hear his hushed whisper of surprise:{/n}"The data-index has harmonised. It radiates... cold."

"The point of reference... has been accepted as valid. Initiating coordinate reconstruction." {n}The humming of Exalt-117's internal mechanisms grows quieter, and in the rhythmic noise you hear his hushed whisper of surprise:{/n}"The data-index has harmonised. It radiates... cold."

"The point of reference... has been accepted as valid. Initiating coordinate reconstruction." {n}The humming of Exalt-117's internal mechanisms grows quieter, and in the rhythmic noise you hear his hushed whisper of surprise:{/n}"The data-index has harmonised. It radiates... cold."

languages.text: “基准点……已被接受为有效。正在重建坐标。”{n}尊使-117体内机械的嗡鸣声逐渐减弱，在那有节奏的低鸣中，你听到他压低声音，惊讶地嘀咕道：{/n}“数据索引已协调一致。它散发着……寒意。”
languages.original_text: "The point of reference... has been accepted as valid. Initiating coordinate reconstruction." {n}The humming of Exalt-117's internal mechanisms grows quieter, and in the rhythmic noise you hear his hushed whisper of surprise:{/n} "The data-index has harmonised. It radiates... cold."

traits.locale_text: “基准点……已被接受为有效。正在重建坐标。”{n}尊使-117体内机械的嗡鸣声逐渐减弱，在那有节奏的低鸣中，你听到他压低声音，惊讶地嘀咕道：{/n}“数据索引已协调一致。它散发着……寒意。”

languages.text: « Le point de référence... est considéré comme valide. Démarrage de la reconstruction des coordonnées. » {n}Le bourdonnement rythmique des mécanismes internes d'Exalt-117 s'atténue, puis vous entendez un murmure de surprise :{/n} « L'index de données s'est harmonisé. Il en émane... du froid. »
languages.original_text: "The point of reference... has been accepted as valid. Initiating coordinate reconstruction." {n}The humming of Exalt-117's internal mechanisms grows quieter, and in the rhythmic noise you hear his hushed whisper of surprise:{/n} "The data-index has harmonised. It radiates... cold."

traits.locale_text: « Le point de référence... est considéré comme valide. Démarrage de la reconstruction des coordonnées. » {n}Le bourdonnement rythmique des mécanismes internes d'Exalt-117 s'atténue, puis vous entendez un murmure de surprise :{/n} « L'index de données s'est harmonisé. Il en émane... du froid. »

languages.text: "Referans noktası... Geçerli kabul edildi. Koordinatların yeniden yapılandırması başlatılıyor." {n}Yüce-117'nin iç mekanizmalarının uğultusu gitgide suskunlaşıyor. Ritmik gürültünün içinde onun kesik, şaşkınlık dolu fısıltısını duyuyorsun.{/n} "Veri dizini uyumu sağlandı. Dışarıya... Soğuk yayıyor."
languages.original_text: "The point of reference... has been accepted as valid. Initiating coordinate reconstruction." {n}The humming of Exalt-117's internal mechanisms grows quieter, and in the rhythmic noise you hear his hushed whisper of surprise:{/n} "The data-index has harmonised. It radiates... cold."

traits.locale_text: "Referans noktası... Geçerli kabul edildi. Koordinatların yeniden yapılandırması başlatılıyor." {n}Yüce-117'nin iç mekanizmalarının uğultusu gitgide suskunlaşıyor. Ritmik gürültünün içinde onun kesik, şaşkınlık dolu fısıltısını duyuyorsun.{/n} "Veri dizini uyumu sağlandı. Dışarıya... Soğuk yayıyor."

languages.text: «El punto de referencia... se acepta como válido. Iniciando reconstrucción de las coordenadas». {n}El zumbido de los mecanismos internos de Exaltado-117 se reduce, y entre el ruido rítmico puedes distinguir su susurro sorprendido:{/n} «El índice de datos se ha armonizado. Irradia... frío».
languages.original_text: "The point of reference... has been accepted as valid. Initiating coordinate reconstruction." {n}The humming of Exalt-117's internal mechanisms grows quieter, and in the rhythmic noise you hear his hushed whisper of surprise:{/n} "The data-index has harmonised. It radiates... cold."

traits.locale_text: «El punto de referencia... se acepta como válido. Iniciando reconstrucción de las coordenadas». {n}El zumbido de los mecanismos internos de Exaltado-117 se reduce, y entre el ruido rítmico puedes distinguir su susurro sorprendido:{/n} «El índice de datos se ha armonizado. Irradia... frío».

languages.text: "Der Referenzpunkt ... wurde als gültig akzeptiert. Initialisiere Rekonstruktion der Koordinaten." {n}Das Summen der internen Mechanismen von Exalt-117 wird leiser, und neben dem rhythmischen Geräusch hörst du ein überraschtes Flüstern:{/n} "Der Datenindex hat sich harmonisiert. Er emittiert ... Kälte."
languages.original_text: "The point of reference... has been accepted as valid. Initiating coordinate reconstruction." {n}The humming of Exalt-117's internal mechanisms grows quieter, and in the rhythmic noise you hear his hushed whisper of surprise:{/n} "The data-index has harmonised. It radiates... cold."

traits.locale_text: "Der Referenzpunkt ... wurde als gültig akzeptiert. Initialisiere Rekonstruktion der Koordinaten." {n}Das Summen der internen Mechanismen von Exalt-117 wird leiser, und neben dem rhythmischen Geräusch hörst du ein überraschtes Flüstern:{/n}"Der Datenindex hat sich harmonisiert. Er emittiert ... Kälte."

languages.text: 「参照ポイント...有効と判断されました。同時再構築を開始します。」{n}エクサルト117の内部機構の唸り音が静かになり、そのリズムに彼の驚きの声が小さく混ざり合う:{/n}「データインデックスが調和しました。冷たく...放出しています。」
languages.original_text: "The point of reference... has been accepted as valid. Initiating coordinate reconstruction." {n}The humming of Exalt-117's internal mechanisms grows quieter, and in the rhythmic noise you hear his hushed whisper of surprise:{/n}"The data-index has harmonised. It radiates... cold."

traits.locale_text: 「参照ポイント...有効と判断されました。同時再構築を開始します。」{n}エクサルト117の内部機構の唸り音が静かになり、そのリズムに彼の驚きの声が小さく混ざり合う:{/n}「データインデックスが調和しました。冷たく...放出しています。」
